name: strategic-implementation
description: Outcome-first planning-to-execution workflow: clarify → product brief → optional UI mockup → plan-mode execution plan → tiered review → deliverable-gated execution. Per-repo documentation registry. v3.6 adds harness-fired hooks for deterministic simplify trigger, edit-thrashing, error-loop, and validation-log surfacing. v4.2 externalizes per-feature artifacts to a shared private GitHub store (gh-CLI adapter + per-repo locator + read-through cache), with stages rewired fallback-safe and conversational feedback replacing file-edit channels. v4.3 removes the obsolete long-running-session drift machinery (chapter rotation + per-turn goal evaluator), bakes a ponytail-style YAGNI hierarchy into plan drafting and the simplify reviewer, and adds an in-plugin frontend taste discipline (slim tier for mockups, rich tier for shipped UI).
